prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) engine: Full bolt-on with HKS Hi-Power Super SQV IV blow-off valve (part #15004-AK001) to prevent compressor surge during aggressive gear shifts, paired with a Tomei 272°/11.5mm lift camshaft set (part #TAA-VQ37-272) for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery (6,500+ RPM redline).

Forced induction via Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (featuring a 300-cell GESI catalytic converter) and a PTP Turbo Blankets GTX-specific turbo blanket to reduce heat soak and spool lag.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (part #35231001) featuring 8-position rebound damping, 20-way compression adjustment, and 12mm of ride height adjustability, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings (Energy Suspension part #4.5111G) to eliminate subframe flex.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (part #LB-INF-EX37) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear) and extended wheel arches to accommodate a staggered wheel setup (19x9.5 +35 front, 19x11 +25 rear) with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (gunmetal finish).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood (part #CF-INF-EX37-HOOD) with integrated NACA ducts for improved airflow to the Garrett GTX3076R intercooler, paired with a custom front splitter from Varis Japan (part #VAR-INF-EX37-SPLITTER) featuring a 3D-printed aluminum support brace for rigidity under high-speed downforce.

Rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (part #PAND-PAN-EX37-DIFF) with integrated dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom fabrication by Burns Stainless) and a custom LED taillight overlay (VLEDS Hyperflash resistors part #VL-HF-RES) for a clean, OEM+ aggressive rear end.
